name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha)
description_en: A wooden sculpture of the seated Buddha Amida Nyorai, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated and located in Nakayama Town.
A written document (letter) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of classical texts. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and held at Endōji temple in Nagasaki.

name_romaji: Matsuda Mikakushi no Bokuseki oyobi Kankei Shiryō
name_en: Calligraphy of Matsuda Mikakushi and Related Materials
description_en: Calligraphic works and related materials classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of classical texts. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town.

name_en: Stone Stupa Slab at Tate Inari Shrine
description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located within the precincts of Inari Shrine in Nagasaki.

name_en: Stone Stupa Slab at Hakusan Shrine
description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located within the precincts of Hakusan Shrine in Kanazawa.

name_en: Ichigami Market Deity Stone of Kanmachi
description_en: A stone object classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located on the grounds of the Nakayama Town Hall.

A road-fork marker stone classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located within the precincts of Tenshōji temple in Nagasaki.
A rice-planting folk dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and performed in the Darumaji district.
A rice-planting folk dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and performed in the Oshio district.
A lion dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and performed in the Tsuchihashi district.

name_en: Kawamukai Konpira Barrel-Floating Ritual of Nakayama Town
description_en: A barrel-floating folk ritual classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and performed in the Nagasaki Kawamukai district.

name_en: Votive Tablet Depicting a Confectionery Shop
description_en: A votive picture tablet (ema) classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and held at Hakusan Shrine in Kanazawa.
A historic site classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located at 4669-1 Nagasaki.
A large ginkgo tree classified as a monument (natural monument). It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located at 419-1 Nagasaki.
A shrine building classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Multi-Storied Stone Pagoda Inscribed with the 12th Year of Kan'ei
description_en: A multi-storied stone pagoda classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Kotaki.

name_en: Unsigned Hexagonal Stone Pillar of Shimanuki
description_en: An unsigned hexagonal stone pillar classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Shimanuki.

name_en: Front Gate of the Rin'un Library
description_en: A front gate classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Akayu.
A bridge classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Koiwasawa.
A five-ring stone stupa (gorintō) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Takehara.
A large stone torii gate classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of structures. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Akayu.

name_en: Wooden Standing and Seated Bodhisattva-Form Statues
description_en: Wooden bodhisattva-form standing and seated statues classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A wooden standing bodhisattva statue classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Ikeguro.
A Chinese-lion sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A pair of guardian lion-dog sculptures (komainu) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

A wooden lacquer-gilt seated statue of the Thousand-Armed Kannon, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Ikeguro.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Shō Kannon
description_en: A wooden standing statue of the Shō Kannon classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Yakushi Nyorai (Bhaisajyaguru)
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Rikyō.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha)
description_en: A wooden standing statue of Amida Nyorai classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Akayu.

name_romaji: Jūni Shinshō Zō, Nyoraigyō Ryūzō Nyoraigyō Zazō, Shinzō
name_en: Statues of the Twelve Divine Generals, Standing and Seated Buddha-Form Figures, and Deity Images
description_en: A group of sculptures including the Twelve Divine Generals and Buddha-form and deity images, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Nishikine.
A repoussé copper-plate hanging Buddha plaque (kakebotoke) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Buddhist Pendant Ornament Inscribed with Zenkōji
description_en: A Buddhist openwork pendant ornament (keman) inscribed with the name Zenkōji, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A gilt-bronze banner classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A Buddhist-style portable shrine (mikoshi) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A large temple bell classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Short Sword Signed by Suishinshi Masahide
description_en: A short sword (wakizashi) bearing the signature of Suishinshi Masahide, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Akayu.
A bugaku court-dance mask named "Ryōō" classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of crafts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
A set of the Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of classical texts. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.

name_en: Receipt for the Donation of Temple Grounds
description_en: A receipt document for the donation of temple grounds, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Shimanuki.

name_en: Land-Tenure Guarantee Document of Date Masamune
description_en: A land-tenure guarantee document (andojō) issued by Date Masamune, classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of old documents. It is municipally designated in Nan'yō City and located in Miyauchi.
